text.title: creational-patterns Failure Modes
text.summary: Migrated antipatterns for creational-patterns as failure modes. Add detector + repair clauses where missing.

failure-mode.description: Service Locator inside business logic: `Container.resolve(EmailService)` called from a domain method.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Hides dependencies, defeats DI, and turns tests back into integration tests. Inject through the constructor instead.

failure-mode.description: Builder that returns a mutable object with public setters after `build()`.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Defeats the immutability guarantee. Either freeze the result or expose only getters.

failure-mode.description: Factory that takes the concrete class as an argument: `factory.create(StripeProvider)`.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Caller already knows the concrete type — the factory adds zero value. Dispatch on a string/enum or inject the class once at config time.
